name: Western Union
description_short: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering auto loans, savings accounts, certificates, and checking with cash back rewards to Oklahoma communities.
description_long:
Western Sun Federal Credit Union (WSFCU) is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving communities in the Tulsa, Oklahoma area. Based in Broken Arrow with multiple branch locations, the credit union has established itself as a community-focused financial provider with a mission to serve members in a friendly, professional manner while offering competitive electronic financial services.

WSFCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including auto loans (new and used vehicles), boat loans, certificates of deposit, money market accounts, checking and savings accounts, mortgage loans, and online banking services. Their flagship checking product is the Kasasa Cash Back Checking account, which provides 3% cash back on up to $400 in debit card purchases per qualifying cycle. Current rates advertised include auto loans as low as 5.49% APR, certificates of deposit up to 3.46% APY, boat loans starting at 7.64% APR, and money market accounts up to 1.20% APY.

WSFCU distinguishes itself through active community engagement, evidenced by their extensive news archive covering financial education topics (debt consolidation, credit scores, phishing scams, identity protection), community events (Shred Day, Car Shows, electronics recycling), and charitable donations to local schools. The credit union operates multiple physical branches with drive-through and ATM access, maintaining traditional banking hours while offering online account access and loan applications. Their personalized approach and member testimonials emphasizing credit repair assistance demonstrate a commitment to member financial improvement.

As a federal credit union, WSFCU provides NCUA insurance protection for member deposits. However, prospective members should note that credit unions typically require membership eligibility (geographic location, employment, or group affiliation) and the advertised rates are subject to credit approval and change without notice. The institution appears well-established but operates regionally rather than nationally, limiting accessibility for non-Oklahoma residents.
pros: Auto loan rates as low as 5.49% APR on new vehicles with online application option
Kasasa Cash Back Checking offering 3% cash back on debit purchases up to $400 per cycle
Multiple physical branch locations in Broken Arrow, Bixby, and Downtown Tulsa with drive-through and ATM access
Certificate of deposit rates up to 3.46% APY for savings goals
Comprehensive financial education and community involvement programs documented in news archive
NCUA-insured member deposits providing federal protection
Personalized member service with documented success in credit repair assistance
Online banking and digital loan application capabilities
cons: Geographic membership limitations—primarily serves Oklahoma area; not accessible to out-of-state residents
All loan rates subject to credit approval; advertised rates are starting points only
Limited branch network compared to national banks, restricting physical access for most consumers
Rates subject to change without notice, providing no rate lock guarantees on advertised offers
Money market rates very modest at 1.20% APY compared to online-only savings institutions
best_for: Oklahoma residents seeking competitive auto financing with local branch support
Members prioritizing rewards checking with 3% cash back on everyday debit purchases
Community-focused consumers valuing personalized service and financial education resources
Credit union members eligible by geography, employment, or group membership criteria
diagnosis: Western Sun Federal Credit Union is best for Oklahoma-area residents seeking competitive auto financing and rewards checking with personalized service from a community-focused, NCUA-insured institution. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—membership requires Oklahoma eligibility, and competitive rates are subject to credit approval; prospective members should contact the credit union directly to confirm membership requirements and current rate terms.
services: New and used auto loans (5.49% APR starting rate)
Kasasa Cash Back Checking (3% cash back rewards)
